profile.name: ALVIN BINOY
profile.bio: Pre-final year Computer Science (Cyber Security) Engineering undergraduate with a strong foundation in Python, Network Security, and Modern Web Development. Experienced in architecting Zero-Trust frameworks, AI-driven workflows, and organizing state-level hackathons.

experience.description: Built 'Coursemate', a student enrolment system using Node.js, ensuring secure data handling. Designed and optimized RESTful APIs for high-concurrency requests.
Built 'UniDine', a campus food ordering app (Java/Firebase) that reduced canteen queues. Implemented real-time database triggers for order syncing.

experience.company: TATA Jyothi Integrated Industrial Incubation Centre (IIIC)
experience.description: Used Creo to design components, explored Yaskawa robotics, and gained hands-on manufacturing exposure. Documented work using GitHub and Markdown.

projects.title: SafeNet: Zero-Trust Micro-Perimeter
projects.description: Engineered a Zero-Trust security tool for SOHO environments. Developed a Python backend automating WireGuard VPN configurations to mitigate lateral movement attacks.

projects.title: alvoCam: Privacy-First Camera
projects.description: Engineered a secure Android camera application capturing zero-metadata images. Integrated native EXIF manipulation for granular control over embedded data.

projects.title: ChatForensics
projects.description: Created a forensic tool to parse exported WhatsApp chat logs, automatically flagging offensive text patterns using keyword analysis and generating visual reports.

projects.title: UyirSafe: AI Road Safety
projects.description: Top 17/3000+ in TN Govt Hackathon. Integrated Teachable Machine models into a React dashboard to detect road accidents in real-time with a scalable alert system.

projects.title: Revivo: E-Waste Management
projects.description: 2nd Runner-up in a National-Level Hackathon. Built a circular economy marketplace connecting e-waste generators with recyclers with a responsive UI.

projects.title: Personal Information Management System
projects.description: A centralized system built using Flask helping individuals securely store, manage, and update various personal information categories.

leadership.description: Conducted 'Blue Team Bootcamp' and interactive sessions on digital hygiene for school students. Mentored juniors on fundamental cybersecurity concepts.
Orchestrated a state-level cybersecurity CTF and Bug Bounty event; handled promotion and technical setup.
Delivered vocational training on Cyber Awareness for schools. Led the Technical & Creative Wing, designing graphic assets and managing logistics.

achievements.title: Bank of India Hackathon
achievements.description: Secured Top 9 position in the PSB's FinTech & Cybersecurity Hackathon 2025 organized by Bank of India & IIT Hyderabad for developing 'Z-Credits', an alternative-data driven credit risk model.

education.institution: APJ Abdul Kalam Technological University | Jyothi Engineering College
education.degree: BTech Computer Science and Engineering (Cyber Security)

certifications: Coursera Project Network - Build a Small Simulated Network with Cisco Packet Tracer
Cisco Networking Academy - Introduction to Cyber Security
